canonical_definition: A multilingual multitask benchmark for speech-to-text generative error correction, covering ASR and ST across 15 languages and 28 language pairs, using N-best lists from Whisper and SeamlessM4T models.
papers: Glider: Global and Local Instruction-Driven Expert Router
